forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KS5EAD57PCBFJGMVB74FF4MK
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: a280
+project: entity-service
+title: '`entity` server: search (Search via EntitySearchIndex)'
+---
+## What
+
+Add the `Search` operation to the `entity` MCP server (the CRUD core is the prerequisite task `01KS5EAD57…`). Search is an **entity capability** (per the user's call) — one `Search` op on `entity`, NOT a separate `search` server.
+
+`Search` wraps `EntitySearchIndex`, which lives in its OWN crate — `crates/swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/index.rs:15` (`EntitySearchIndex`) — not in `swissarmyhammer-entity`. The `entity` server crate must depend on `swissarmyhammer-entity-search` (clean direction: entity-mcp → entity-search).
+
+Files:
+- `<entity server crate>/Cargo.toml` — add `swissarmyhammer-entity-search` dependency
+- `<entity server crate>/src/operations.rs` — add `#[operation]` struct `Search { query, type? }` returning matching entities (optionally type-filtered)
+- wiring so the server holds/builds the `EntitySearchIndex`
+
+This backs the search UI (`app.search` opens the palette via `ui_state`; the QUERY calls `entity` `Search`).
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `Search { query, type? }` reachable on the `entity` server, backed by `EntitySearchIndex`
+- [ ] Returns matching entities; honors the optional type filter
+- [ ] No standalone `search` server exists — search lives on `entity`
+- [ ] `_meta` tree includes `Search`
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `<entity server crate>/tests/integration/entity_search_e2e.rs` — index a few entities; `Search` finds by text; type filter narrows results
+- [ ] `_meta` snapshot
+- [ ] `cargo test` for the host crate passes
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd`
+
+Depends on the `entity` CRUD core (`01KS5EAD57…`). Prerequisite for: the `app.search` query path (app-shell-commands plugin) and the frontend search UI.
\ No newline at end of file
